title: CreatureCorner
description: Freaks and Fauna brought to minecraft!
body:
Creature Corner is a small mod centered around Pigeons as-well as several other species of wildlife from around the world! As well as animals I personally just enjoy. 
We're currently in the works adding new content in the form of animals, plants and items to enrich the gameplay!

![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5456fe8ffc7de4dddf03df8c2e8e64e21a199881.png)

＞Join our discord!＜
＞[Discord](https://discord.gg/DzXAsuUnCb)＜
